body_text:
25:14 â June 24, 2025
Update to the Enterprise Fraud Management Part
We updated information in the Enterprise Fraud Management (EFM) Part. This update is related to the
announcement
regarding monitoring mode for mobile deposits in EFM.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Enterprise Fraud Management Part
Minor edits throughout
Section 8.2, Identifying a Transaction as Fraudulent
We added descriptions for the newly added risk reasons related to mobile deposits.
Section 8.9, Mobile Deposits in EFM
We added information about email notifications for mobile transactions and when or how to mark transactions as Risk or No-risk since monitor mode became live.
Section 8.11, Recovery of Funds
We updated this section to include mobile deposit transactions.
Questions

1-888-889-7878,

support@central1.com
